message:
docs(cli): Document env vars for output format in help text

Add documentation noting that XF_OUTPUT_FORMAT and TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT
environment variables can be used to set the default output format,
improving discoverability of this feature for users who prefer
environment-based configuration over CLI flags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ pub struct Cli {
     #[arg(long, env = "XF_INDEX", global = true)]
     pub index: Option<PathBuf>,
 
-    /// Output format
+    /// Output format (env: XF_OUTPUT_FORMAT, TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT)
     #[arg(long, short = 'f', default_value = "text", global = true)]
     pub format: OutputFormat,
